div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 188px; height: 1px; padding-top: 350px; margin-left: 206px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0px; text-align: center;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Inicio
SDA <- Z
SCL <- Z
bits_counter <- 8
byte_available <- 0
to_send[7:0] <- data_tx[7:0]
captured[7:0]
ACK
